use_cases: Main site or app header for brand display and navigation anchoring
User profile quick-access display in application headers
Responsive navigation bar for landing pages or dashboards
Branded header component for consistent UI across pages
ai_summary: A minimalist header navbar component with glass-morphism effects featuring a brand title and user profile section. Includes a decorative diagonal grid background with radial mask and backdrop blur for visual depth. Responsive design hides user details on mobile while maintaining essential profile avatar access. Built for Next.js/React with Tailwind CSS theming support.
